title: erysimum aubrietioides
intro: Erysimum aubrietioides, also known as Aubriet's wallflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial plant with yellow or purple flowers, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Erysimum aubrietioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote overall health and well-being, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
